socialProof.text: Sign up now and lock in launch pricing forever

problem.headline: Your tools don't talk to each other
problem.body: You're juggling Calendly for bookings, a spreadsheet for clients, Canva for your website, and three apps for invoicing. Nothing syncs. You copy-paste the same info everywhere. And you're still doing admin at 10pm.

solution.headline: One platform. Everything connected.
solution.body: Servible brings your entire business into one place. Your CRM knows your calendar. Your invoices pull from tracked time. Your website updates when you add a service. And AI handles the busywork so you can focus on clients.

features.headline: Everything you need, nothing you don't

meta.title: Features — Servible
meta.description: AI assistant, CRM, booking, invoicing, website builder, and client portal. Everything you need to run your service business.

hero.headline: Everything you need to run your service business
hero.subheadline: From first contact to final invoice — managed by AI, controlled by you.

aiAssistant.title: Virtual team members that actually work
aiAssistant.description1: Servible gives you AI-powered virtual team members — agents that sit right on your Team page. Your Operations Manager handles everything from client management to invoicing. Nova, your Finance specialist, takes care of payment reminders and financial reports.
aiAssistant.description2: With 22+ shared tools, they create clients, log time, generate invoices, search data, and send emails — all through natural conversation. Every action goes through an approval inbox, so you stay in control.
aiAssistant.description3: Set up automated workflows for recurring tasks. Payment reminders escalate in tone. Weekly reports land in your inbox. And each agent learns your preferences through custom instructions.
aiAssistant.f1: AI agents on your Team page (Operations Manager, Nova)
aiAssistant.f2: 22+ tools: clients, invoices, quotes, projects, bookings, time, files
aiAssistant.f4: AI-drafted emails sent directly from chat
aiAssistant.f6: Available in Dutch, English, German, French

chat.title: Servible AI
chat.user1: How's the Acme Corp project going?
chat.user2: Can you send me a weekly update like this every Monday at 9 AM?
chat.assistant2: Done! Scheduled a weekly project summary for Monday 9:00 AM. I'll include progress, budget status, and upcoming deadlines for all active projects.

crm.title: Know your clients inside and out
crm.description1: Every client gets a complete profile showing their entire history with your business. See projects, invoices, contracts, files, and every interaction — all on one page.
crm.description2: Track clients through your pipeline from lead to loyal customer. Tag and segment your client base. Never lose track of a follow-up again.
crm.f1: Full client lifecycle (Lead → Prospect → Client → Archived)
crm.f2: Multiple contacts per client with roles

card.name: Acme Corp
card.contact: John van der Berg · Primary contact

projectsTasks.title: Projects with built-in budgets and tasks
projectsTasks.description1: Project management tied to your clients. Track tasks, budgets (both hours and monetary), and time entries per project — all in one place.
projectsTasks.description2: Progress bars show completion at a glance. Budget warnings flag when a project is going over. Every task links to a client, a project, and your time tracker.
projectsTasks.f1: Budget tracking (hours + monetary) with visual progress
projectsTasks.f2: Task priorities: Low, Medium, High, Urgent
projectsTasks.f3: Time entries per task with over-budget warnings
projectsTasks.f4: File attachments linked to tasks and projects
projectsTasks.f6: Projects linked to clients, quotes, and invoices

mockup.client: Acme Corp · John van der Berg

booking.title: Let clients book you — on your terms
booking.description1: Create booking types for your different services. Set your availability, buffer times, and custom intake questions. Share your booking page and let clients self-schedule.
booking.description2: For existing clients, the portal booking flow gives access to additional booking types like paid sessions or premium consultations. Everything creates a clean audit trail — client, booking, calendar event, notifications.
booking.f1: Public booking page with your branding
booking.f2: Per-day availability rules with buffer times
booking.f4: Location types (Online, At Provider, At Client)

mockup.subtitle: Select a service and pick a time
mockup.intakeLabel: What would you like to discuss?

quotes.title: From proposal to signed contract in minutes
quotes.description1: Create professional quotes with line items, optional add-ons, and proper tax handling. Finalize and send to clients with a PDF attachment. Track when they view it.
quotes.description2: Clients accept or reject quotes through the portal or via a public link. AI generates introduction text automatically. Convert accepted quotes to projects with a single click.
quotes.f2: Optional line items clients can select/deselect
quotes.f3: Send to client with PDF attachment
quotes.f4: Portal: view, accept, or reject quotes

timeTracking.title: Track every minute. Bill with confidence.
timeTracking.description1: A persistent timer bar follows you across every page. Log time manually or use the live stopwatch — entries link to clients, projects, and services with automatic rate derivation.
timeTracking.description2: See summaries for today, this week, and this month. Split billable from non-billable time at a glance. When you're ready, convert tracked time to an invoice with one click.
timeTracking.f1: Persistent timer bar across all pages
timeTracking.f2: Billable / non-billable split with visual breakdown
timeTracking.f3: Period summaries: today, this week, this month
timeTracking.f4: Per-service hourly rates with automatic derivation
timeTracking.f5: My time / All time toggle for team overview
timeTracking.f6: Convert tracked time to invoice with one click

invoicing.title: Professional invoicing. Get paid faster.
invoicing.description1: Create professional invoices with line items, EU tax handling (21%, 9%, zero-rate, exempt, reverse charge), and automatic numbering. Generate PDFs and send them directly to clients.
invoicing.description2: Accept payments via Stripe — iDEAL, card, SEPA, Bancontact. Track partial payments and credit notes. AI payment reminders escalate in tone automatically when invoices go overdue.
invoicing.f2: EU tax types (21%, 9%, zero-rate, exempt, reverse charge)
invoicing.f6: Create from quote or tracked time
invoicing.f7: AI payment reminders with escalating tone

websiteBuilder.title: Describe your business. Get a website.
websiteBuilder.description1: Tell Servible about your business — your services, your audience, your style. AI generates a complete, multi-page website with your copy, colors, and structure.
websiteBuilder.description2: Want to change something? Just chat. "Make the hero section more bold." "Add a testimonials section." "Change the color scheme to warmer tones." No drag-and-drop builders, no templates to customize.
websiteBuilder.f1: Full website generated from a description
websiteBuilder.f2: 14 block types (hero, features, pricing, testimonials, FAQ, etc.)
websiteBuilder.f3: Edit any section through natural language
websiteBuilder.f4: AI-powered image search from your library and stock

mockup.userMessage: I'm a freelance UX designer in Amsterdam. Clean, minimal aesthetic. Services: UX audit, design sprints, and ongoing retainers.
mockup.pageTagline: UX design that puts your users first
mockup.editPrompt: "Make the hero bolder and add a dark mode toggle"

portal.title: Give clients their own space
portal.description1: Every client gets access to a white-labeled portal where they can see their projects, invoices, files, and bookings. No more "can you resend that invoice?" emails.
portal.description2: Passwordless login via magic link keeps it simple. Clients see what you want them to see — nothing more, nothing less.
portal.f3: Invoices with PDF download and payment status
portal.f6: Files grouped by project with download

blog.title: Publish content without the content struggle
blog.description1: Describe the blog post you want, and AI writes it. Full rich-text content with your brand voice applied. Edit inline, regenerate sections, let AI suggest images.
blog.description2: Publish to your Servible website or multiple sites at once. SEO metadata generated automatically.
blog.f2: Rich text editor with AI inline editing
blog.f7: REST API for external blog integration

mockup.title: Why Every Freelancer Needs an Automated Client Intake
mockup.paragraph: Most freelancers lose hours every week to manual intake processes. Endless email threads, copy-pasting details into spreadsheets, and forgetting to follow up on leads…
mockup.suggestionText: Add a section about reducing no-shows with automated reminders?
mockup.seoMetaTitle: Automated Client Intake for Freelancers | Servible
mockup.seoDesc: Learn how automating your client intake saves 5+ hours per week and reduces missed leads.

fileManager.title: Your files, organized by AI
fileManager.description1: Drop any file — document, image, contract, receipt — and ask your AI assistant to archive it. It reads the content, understands what it is, and files it in the right place automatically.
fileManager.description2: Need something back? Just describe it. "I need that proposal we sent to Acme last quarter" or "Find me a photo of a business woman using a notebook." If your archive doesn't have it, continue the search on our integrated stock library and grab it there.
fileManager.f6: Files linked to clients and projects

mockup.title: File Manager
mockup.user1: Archive this brand guidelines PDF for Acme Corp
mockup.assistant1: Done! I've read the document and filed it:
mockup.check1: Filed under: Acme Corp → Brand Assets
mockup.check2: Tagged: brand guidelines, logo usage, colors
mockup.user2: I need an image of a business woman using a notebook
mockup.assistant2: I found 2 matches in your archive:

teamManagement.title: Your team — humans and AI, side by side
teamManagement.description1: A unified team page showing human members and AI agents together. See who's on the team, what role they have, and whether AI agents are active — all in one view.
teamManagement.description2: Invite new members by email with role-based access control. Five roles from Owner to Viewer. Each member manages their own booking availability and time entries.
teamManagement.f1: 5 roles: Owner, Admin, Member, Bookkeeper, Viewer
teamManagement.f3: AI agents listed on the team page
teamManagement.f5: Own time entry management per team member

comparison.headline: Sound familiar?
comparison.subtitle: These are the daily frustrations of running a service business. Servible was built to eliminate every single one.

r1.pain: You spend Sunday evening writing invoices and chasing payments
r1.solve: Track time as you work. One click turns it into an invoice. Clients pay online via iDEAL or card.

r2.pain: Clients email you to book, you go back and forth 5 times to find a slot
r2.solve: Share your booking page. Clients pick a time, answer intake questions, and it's done.

r3.pain: Your client info is scattered across Gmail, Notion, Google Drive, and a spreadsheet
r3.solve: One client profile with every project, invoice, file, note, and conversation in one place.

r4.pain: You copy-paste proposals in Google Docs and manually track who opened them
r4.solve: Generate quotes with line items, send a link, track views, and let clients sign digitally.

r5.pain: Updating your website means calling a developer or fighting with a page builder
r5.solve: Just tell AI what you want. "Add a testimonials section." Done in seconds.

r6.pain: You can never find that one file you need — was it in Dropbox, Google Drive, or email?
r6.solve: Ask your AI assistant. It reads, tags, and files everything. Describe what you need in plain language.

meta.title: About Us — Servible
meta.description: We're building the business platform we wished existed when we were freelancing. Learn about our mission and team.

hero.headline: Built for people who do the work
hero.subheadline: We're building the business platform we wished existed when we were freelancing.

mission.headline: Why we're building Servible
mission.p1: Freelancers and small service businesses deserve better tools than spreadsheets and disconnected apps. But enterprise software is too complex, and most "simple" tools are too limited.
mission.p2: We believe AI changes this equation. Not as a gimmick or a chatbot, but as a genuinely useful assistant that handles the work you don't want to do.
mission.p3: Servible is built on a simple idea: your business management software should work for you, not the other way around.

v1.title: Simplicity over features
v1.description: More features isn't better. We add things that make your life easier and say no to everything else.

v2.title: AI as assistant, not gimmick
v2.description: AI should do useful work, not just generate content. Our AI creates invoices, searches data, manages bookings.

v3.title: European by design
v3.description: Built in Europe, for European businesses. GDPR compliant, EU servers, local payment methods, proper invoicing.

v4.title: Respect your time
v4.description: You became a freelancer to do work you love, not to do admin. Every feature we build should give you time back.

founder.name: Hylke Heidstra
founder.p1: After 25+ years in software, I know one thing for sure: the best tools are born from personal frustration.
founder.p2: I started as a consultant, built my own IT company serving clients worldwide, and sold it to Sitecore. There I spent 10 years as Senior Product Manager, experiencing the journey from startup to enterprise. After that, a stint at an e-commerce software company.
founder.p3: What drives me? Discovering problems and crafting elegant solutions. When AI emerged, it grabbed me immediately — not as hype, but as an opportunity to build software that actually does the work for you.
founder.p4: I'm building Servible from my own experience as an entrepreneur. I know the evenings behind spreadsheets, the hassle of disconnected tools, the admin that never ends. There has to be a better way. One platform, AI that thinks along, and you doing what you're best at: helping your clients.
founder.p5: Questions, ideas, or just want to chat? I'd love to hear from you.

meta.title: FAQ — Servible
meta.description: Frequently asked questions about Servible. Learn about our AI-powered business platform for service providers.

hero.headline: Frequently asked questions
hero.subheadline: Everything you need to know about Servible. Can't find what you're looking for? Get in touch.

q1.a: Servible is an AI-powered business management platform built for freelancers, agencies, and small service businesses. It replaces your CRM, scheduling, invoicing, website, and client portal with one connected platform — managed by an intelligent AI assistant.

q2.a: Servible is built for people who deliver services: consultants, coaches, designers, developers, marketing agencies, accountants, therapists — anyone who manages clients, projects, and invoices. If you're tired of juggling disconnected tools, Servible is for you.

q3.q: How is Servible different from other business tools?
q3.a: Most tools solve one problem — scheduling, invoicing, or CRM. Servible connects everything in one platform, so your calendar knows your clients, your invoices pull from tracked time, and your website updates when you add a service. Plus, the AI assistant can actually do things: create invoices, find clients, log time — just by asking.

q4.q: Is Servible available in my language?
q4.a: Servible is available in Dutch, English, German, and French. The AI assistant understands and responds in all supported languages, and you can switch at any time.

q1.q: What can the AI assistant actually do?
q1.a: The AI assistant can create clients, projects, invoices, and time entries. It can search your data, summarize your revenue, find overdue projects, draft emails, and more. It understands your business context — your services, clients, and preferences — so every action is informed and relevant.

q2.q: Is the AI a chatbot that answers FAQs?
q2.a: No. The Servible AI is an operational assistant. It doesn't just answer questions — it takes action in your business. Think of it as a capable team member that handles the admin work you don't want to do.

q3.q: Does the AI learn from my data?
q3.a: The AI uses your business data to provide relevant responses and actions — like knowing your clients, services, and preferred rates. Your data is never used to train models or shared with other users. It stays yours.

q1.a: Yes. You create booking types for your services, set your availability and buffer times, and share your booking page. Clients pick a time and book — no back-and-forth emails. Confirmations and reminders are sent automatically.

q2.q: How does the website builder work?
q2.a: Describe your business — your services, audience, and style — and Servible generates a complete, multi-page website. Want to change something? Just tell the AI: "Make the hero section bolder" or "Add a testimonials section." No drag-and-drop, no templates.

q3.a: Servible supports payments through Stripe, including iDEAL, credit/debit cards, SEPA direct debit, and Bancontact. More payment providers are on the roadmap.

q4.q: Do my clients get their own portal?
q4.a: Yes. Every client gets access to a white-labeled portal where they can view projects, download invoices, book appointments, and access shared files. They log in via a simple magic link — no password needed.

q1.a: All data is stored on EU-based servers. We use industry-standard encryption both in transit and at rest. Your data never leaves the European Union.

q2.a: Yes, fully. Servible is built in Europe, for European businesses. We're GDPR compliant by design — from data storage and processing to the right to export and delete your data at any time.

q3.a: Yes. You can export all your data — clients, projects, invoices, time entries — at any time. Your data belongs to you, and you can take it with you if you ever leave.

q1.a: Sign up for the early bird list to get notified when we launch. You'll get early access and lock in our launch pricing forever. Or schedule a call to see a personal demo.

q2.a: Yes. Every plan comes with a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required. After 14 days you decide if you want to continue.

q3.q: Can I migrate from my current tools?
q3.a: We're building import tools for common platforms. During early access, our team will help you migrate your existing client data, so you don't have to start from scratch.
